transcript:
CALLER: Haan hello. Mujhe pata karna tha ki aap online payment accept karte hain ya nahi.
AGENT: Haan ji, hum UPI, net banking aur debit/credit card sab accept karte hain — online aur clinic mein dono jagah.
CALLER: Aur koi payment link bhej sakte hain mujhe? Bill abhi settle karna hai but main aa nahi sakta personally.
AGENT: Bilkul. Aapka patient ID ya invoice number batayein.
CALLER: Patient ID SNC-P-77432 hai.
AGENT: Theek hai. Aapke registered number pe payment link bhej deta hoon. 5 minute mein aa jaana chahiye. Amount hai 2,800 rupaye.
CALLER: Perfect, link aa gaya toh kar dunga. Thank you.
AGENT: Aapka swagat hai. Koi dikkat ho toh call kar lena.
